put.description: Mark an order as PAID after verifying EFT/Manual payment. The request body may include notes, paymentDate, amount, and paymentReference.

post.description: Receive payment confirmation from WordPress when order payment is completed

name.description:
Dynamic field to display the Person's name and date of birth.
Used for display purposes.

format.description:
Format string, using Java String.format() specification, to display the tag number based on the sequence number.
A mandatory %d field has to be provided.

validFrom.description: The default and earliest date tags of this type can be valid.

validTo.description: The default and latest date tags of this type can be valid. Leave blank to leave unconstrained.

CategoryDTO.description:
High level categories, defined at organisational level, which is used as a basis for Series and Event specific categories.
These categories are linked to the organisations who define them in regulations and rules.
It provides a mechanism to link different category configurations across many events which are common, and can then
be used for leader boards or records.

minAge.description: Minimum allowed age for this category. Leave blank if not applicable.

maxAge.description: Maximum allowed age for this category. Leave blank if not applicable.

gender.description: Gender restriction for this category. Leave blank if not applicable.

ownerOrganisation.description: The organisation controlling this category. For national events this has to be the national organisation.

disciplines.description: The disciplines where this category is active.

feederCategories.description: Categories that feed into this category.

event.description: A course is owned by an event.

type.description: For regulation tracks this indicates the type.

CourseTypeDTO.description: Defines a regulation course under a given discipline.

parent.description: Alternative course layouts should point to a parent course.

name.description: A unique name for the list.

displayName.description: The display name used on-screen or in reports

metaKey.description: Meta key to associate values from this list to a Person.

name.description: A unique name for the list entry.

code.description: Optional code to identity the entry. Could also be used as a filter, if required.

responsibleOrganisation.description: Defines the owner of the Discipline. Used to filter EventCategories.

EventCategoryDTO.description:
A catogory associated with a Series or Event.
It allows setting Series and Event specific details, such as Products.
Rather than having a SeriesCategory and EventCategory, this entity combines both into one.
If Series is set, then it is a Series category, otherwise an Event category.

minAge.description: Override minimum allowed age for this category. Leave blank if not applicable.

maxAge.description: Override maximum allowed age for this category. Leave blank if not applicable.

gender.description: Override gender restriction for this category. Leave blank if not applicable.

entryCategory.description: Indicate if this category can be used for new entries.

raceCategory.description: Indicate if this category can be used in races.

sourceCategory.description: The underlying standard category this category is based on.

product.description: The product to use when creating an entry based on this category.

seriesCategory.description: If this is an Event category, this is the underlying Series category it is based on.

feederCategories.description: Event Categories that feed into this event. Only applicable for race categories (raceCategory = true) and where sourceCategories are not set (thus ad-hoc EventCategories).

event.description: An event is a collection of one or more races (activities) are held on a day or series of days.

EventDTO.description: An event is a collection of one or more races (activities) are held on a day or series of days.

calendarType.description: Product/component used to visualise the calendar listing.

csaMembershipRequired.description:
Should CSA Membership checking be enabled for this event?
If set it overrides the value set in the Series.

csaLicenseRequired.description:
Should CSA License checking be enabled for this event?
If set it overrides the value set in the Series.

csaStrictRegistration.description:
Set to TRUE if CSA membership and license checking cannot be skipped during registration.
If set it overrides the value set in the Series.

csaDayLicenseDisallow.description:
Set to TRUE to disapply CSA day licenses for this event.
If set it overrides the value set in the Series.

formId.description:
Set the Person questionnaire form to be used during registration.
If set it overrides the value set in the Series.

productMode.description:
Determines how category products will be handled.
If set it overrides the value set in the Series.

productDefault.description: The default Product to apply when entering for the event. If set it overrides the value set in the Series.

productNumberAdd.description: The product to use when adding an additional number. If set it overrides the value set in the Series.

productNumberFirst.description: The product to use when adding the first number. If set it overrides the value set in the Series.

productTagAdd.description: The product to use when adding an additional tag. If set it overrides the value set in the Series.

productTagFirst.description: The product to use when adding the first tag. If set it overrides the value set in the Series.

customList1.description: Custom code list 1 - Codes from this list can be used for participant list_1 entries.

customList2.description: Custom code list 2 - Codes from this list can be used for participant list_2 entries.

customList3.description: Custom code list 3 - Codes from this list can be used for participant list_3 entries.

EventParticipantDTO.description: Represents a Person participating in an event.

age.description: Age on the first day of the event.

team.description: In case this is a team members the participant is linked to the team participant entry.

MembershipCriteriaDTO.description: Represents the different pricing criteria for each MembershipPeriod

format.description:
Format string, using Java String.format() specification, to display the number based on the sequence number.
A mandatory %d field has to be provided.

validFrom.description: The default and earliest date numbers of this type can be valid.

validTo.description: The default and latest date numbers of this type can be valid. Leave blank to leave unconstrained.

parent.description: Set Parent to indicate a number subtype

externalId.description: Foreign key to external order module

availablePaymentMethods.description: Available payment methods for this order

referenceCode.description: Reference code for EFT and manual payments

person.description: Person linked to this item, if applicable

eventParticipant.description: EventParticipant linked to this item, if applicable

membership.description: Membership linked to this item, if applicable

number.description: Number linked to this item, if applicable

tag.description: Tag linked to this item, if applicable

personName.description: Person this line item is for

unitPrice.description: Unit price for this line item

totalPrice.description: Total price for this line item (quantity * unitPrice)

assignedNumber.description: Assigned number resolved from linked Membership or EventParticipant

parent.description: Parent organisation. Disciplines will cascade from parent.

PersonDTO.description:
Represents a natural person.
A person form the basis for a participant or an authenticated user.

name.description:
Dynamic field to display the Person's name and date of birth.
Used for display purposes.

contactNumber.description: Telephone number. Usually a cellphone number.

identityNumber.description: Number associated with the identification type.

identityType.description: Identificaiton type, such as a national ID or passport.

language.description: Native language or preferred contact language.

emergencyRelationship.description: Emergency contact person's relationship to the person.

parentRelationship.description: Parent or guardian's relationship to the person.

event.description: An event is a collection of one or more races (activities) are held on a day or series of days.

ProductDTO.description:
A product represent a fee, product or service which can be billed to a Person.
Product will be a wrapper for WooCommerce Product.

externalId.description: Foreign key to external product module

session.description: For multi-day events this refers to the day number, where the first day is day 1.

eventReferenceNumber.description: The numeric reference of the event for display purposes.

active.description: To remove the entry from the program it can be set as disabled.

seq.description: The sequence of this event within the overall event program.

next.description: The next related event in the program, i.e. for multi-round races.

prev.description: The previous related event in the program, i.e. for multi-round races.

event.description: The Event this ProgramEntry item is related to.

startTime.description: Scheduled or actual start of the race.

minEntries.description: Configuration: Minimum number of entries required to host this race.

maxEntries.description: Configuration: Maximum number of entries for this race.

durationSeconds.description: Duration of this race. This is an estimation prior to the race and the actual after the race.

active.description: Indicate if this race is going to happen or has happened.

endTime.description: Time when timing for the group ended.

finishTime.description: Time when the first participant in this group finished.

finishDurationMilliSeconds.description: The race duration in milli seconds of the fastest Participant in this group.

config.description: The configuration to be used for this race

sequence.description: The sequence of this number within the type.

RaceTypeConfigDTO.description: Defines the race type variation, which could discriminate between World, National or Regional events,, or based on participant counts.

minEntries.description: Minimum number of entries for this configuration.

maxEntries.description: Maximum number of entries for this for this configuration.

raceType.description: Defines the standard race types. This will determine how the event is configured.

RaceTypeDTO.description: Defines the standard race types. This will determine how the event is configured.

type.description: System type code - Determines the integration logic to employ

seq.description: The round sequence in the Race.

minEntries.description: Configuration: Minimum number of entries required to host this round.

maxEntries.description: Configuration: Maximum number of entries for this round.

distanceMeters.description: Distance of this round if different from Race.

durationSeconds.description: Duration of this race. This is an estimation prior to the race and the actual after the race.

startTime.description: Scheduled or actual start of the race.

active.description: Indicate if this race is going to happen or has happened.

endTime.description: Time when timing for the group ended.

finishTime.description: Time when the first participant in this group finished.

finishDurationMilliSeconds.description: The race duration in milli seconds of the fastest Participant in this group.

race.description: The Race this round is associated with.

prevRound.description: The previous round in this Race.

SeriesDTO.description:
A series is a collection of events.
They are grouped together to have a final outcome in terms of standing or ranking,
or alternatively to share common configuration parameters (i.e. re-usable race numbers) and/or fees (i.e. an annual series entry).

An event could be part of multiple series.

A series can be marked as private if it is used solely for administrative/operational purposes, such as tracking participants in a given season.

csaMembershipRequired.description: Should CSA Membership checking be enabled for this series?

csaLicenseRequired.description: Should CSA License checking be enabled for this series?

csaStrictRegistration.description: Set to TRUE if CSA membership and license checking cannot be skipped during registration.

csaDayLicenseDisallow.description: Set to TRUE to disapply CSA day licenses for events in this series.

formId.description: Set the Person questionnaire form to be used during registration.

productMode.description: Determines how category products will be handled.

sanctioningOrganisation.description: The organisation sanctioning the series. Used to filter the EventCategories.

seriesProductDefault.description: The Product to apply when entering for the series.

productDefault.description: The default Product to apply when entering for any event in the series.

productNumberAdd.description: The product to use when adding an additional number.

productNumberFirst.description: The product to use when adding the first number.

productTagAdd.description: The product to use when adding an additional tag.

productTagFirst.description: The product to use when adding the first tag.

customList1.description: Custom code list 1 - Codes from this list can be used for participant list_1 entries.

customList2.description: Custom code list 2 - Codes from this list can be used for participant list_2 entries.

customList3.description: Custom code list 3 - Codes from this list can be used for participant list_3 entries.

seq.description: Sequence of this start group in the Race.

StartGroupParticipantDTO.description: Defines a Participant starting in a StartGroup.

ResultSetDTO.description: Group related race results under one collection, allowing state management and versioning.

customList1.description: Custom code list 1 - Codes from this list can be used for participant list_1 entries.

customList2.description: Custom code list 2 - Codes from this list can be used for participant list_2 entries.

RaceResultDTO.description:
Final and consolidated result outcome for a race.
In races with multiple start groups and/or rounds, this entity
represents the final outcome for the race.

position.description: Position in the race. First place will be 1, followed by second as 2, etc.

durationMilliSecond.description: For duration based outcomes this indicates the duration underpinning the result.

points.description: For points based outcomes this indicates the points underpinning the result.

RaceResultMetaDTO.description:
RaceResult meta data is used to store additional information to the result,
such as split times and split rankings.

age.description: Age on the day of the race.

availablePaymentMethods.description: Available payment methods for this order

team.description: In case this is a team members the participant is linked to the team participant entry.

amount.description: Amount is positive for debit, negative for credit

AccessUpgradeRequest.description: Request to upgrade access level by providing additional verification

linkedPersonId.description: The ID of the existing LinkedPerson record

additionalFields.description: Additional verification fields to increase match score

idNumber.description: SA ID Number (13 digits for full, 6 for partial)

AccessUpgradeResponse.description: Response from access level upgrade operation

upgraded.description: Whether the access level was actually upgraded (false if already at max)

newAccessLevel.description: The new access level after upgrade

newScore.description: The new match score after adding additional fields

errorCode.description: Error code if the operation failed

suggestedFields.description: Suggested fields to provide if score is still below threshold

MaskedSuggestion.description: Masked person suggestion for progressive matching

matchedFields.description: List of fields that matched the input

suggestedAccessLevel.description: The suggested access level based on score (only for UNIQUE_MATCH)

candidateCount.description: Number of candidates found (only for AMBIGUOUS)

suggestedFields.description: Suggested fields to provide for better matching (only for AMBIGUOUS/NO_MATCH)

LinkByTokenRequest.description: Request to link a person using an opaque match token

matchToken.description: The opaque match token from progressive matching

linkType.description: The type of relationship to create

linkedPersonId.description: The ID of the created or updated LinkedPerson record

personId.description: The ID of the linked person (User.id)

accessLevel.description: The access level granted based on match score

errorCode.description: Error code if the operation failed

email.description: Email address associated with the order

lineItems.description: List of line items in the order
